name: lazy-flow
description: Open-source DORA + Flow + PR + Code + Agile metrics platform for Claude Code. Fuses GitHub and Jira into a local-first, fully-transparent delivery intelligence layer with cited AI insights.
author: Ricky Stevens

github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token or App installation token. Required for GitHub sync.

jira_oauth_token.description: Jira Cloud OAuth 2.0 token (read-only scopes). Required for Jira sync.

anthropic_api_key.description: Anthropic API key. Required for AI-powered insights (ticket alignment, effort, anomaly explanation, PR quality).

repos.description: Comma-separated list of GitHub repositories to track, e.g. ORG/app,ORG/api

jira_projects.description: Comma-separated list of Jira project keys to track, e.g. ENG,INFRA

visibility.description: Metric visibility mode: public (default, open-by-design), team, or self.

churn_window_days.description: Lookback window in days for churn/work-type metrics. Default 30.
